---
title: "OBIS DNA Training Slide Decks"
subtitle: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: [obis_theme.scss]
    css: [custom.css]
---

# Slide decks

- [2026 July OBIS Node Training on DNA data](https://iobis.github.io/obis_edna_slides_node_training/)
- [2026 July INVEMAR DNA data management](index-invemar.qmd)
